prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约21866→22462→21021→20456，整体在2万–2.2万区间窄幅波动，呈缓慢前移趋势；2025年河南首年新高考，物理类分为两个专业组，再 选不限组（含工商管理、建筑学、金融工程等）最低位次约59240名，较往年大幅后移，主要受考试模式与专业组结构变化影响，2025年基准位次约59240名；该 校在河南理科/物理类计划：2021年248人、2022年251人、2023年250人、2024年250人、2025年238人，近年基本稳定在250人左右；2026年物理类计划大幅扩招至300人，较 2025年增加62人、增幅约26%，扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取门槛，使最低位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第80名， 近年排名稳定在80–83名区间，属于中上游211，工科实力突出，有"汽车界黄埔军校"之称；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用 他人作品参赛、开除涉学术不端学生），对报考热度有轻微抑制作用；抖音热度总排名第77位、评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等偏低；2025年曾出现热门专业投档线暴跌信号，但 属局部专业现象；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A，为该校唯一A级学科；机械工程、仪器科学、材料科学等工科实力较强，与招生专业中的机械类、 仪器类、材料类等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年高考周期内，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐，这些工科专业与合肥工业大学优势方 向高度匹配，对物理类考生有较强吸引力；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（含不确定标注），较2025年物理类+历史类合计约90.7万大幅增长约32%，按历史比例估算物理 类考生约73.4万人，竞争显著加剧；合肥工业大学位于安徽省（非河南生源大省），在河南招生规模较大，2026年物理类计划30 0人，属该校在省外的重要生源地；无显著地域偏好偏移信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类大幅扩招26%（使位次后移）与河南省考生总数大幅增长约32%（使竞争加剧、 位次前移）两大核心因素，扩招与考生增加效应基本对冲但考生增幅略占上风，叠加工科专业持续高热对报考的拉动作用，预计2026年最低录取位次。预测最低位次约68198名，区间67698–68698名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum science ranking was approximately 21866 → 22462 → 21021 → 20456, fluctuating narrowly within the 20,000–22,000 range, showing a slow forward trend; in 2025, Henan's first year of the new college entrance exam, the Physics Category is divided into two major groups. The group with no additional subject requirements (including Business Administration, Architecture, Financial Engineering, etc.) had a minimum ranking of approximately 59,240, significantly lower than previous years, mainly due to changes in exam format and major group structure. The 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 59,240. The university's science/physics enrollment plan in Henan: 248 in 2021, 251 in 2022, 250 in 2023, 250 in 2024, and 238 in 2025, remaining stable at around 250 in recent years. In 2026, the Physics Category plan significantly expands to 300, an increase of 62 students or about 26% compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will directly lower the admission threshold, increasing the minimum ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings main list, with a stable ranking in the 80–83 range in recent years. It is a mid-to-upper tier 211 university with strong engineering capabilities, known as the 'Whampoa Military Academy of the Automotive Industry.' During the 2026 college entrance exam cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to academic misconduct incidents (students plagiarizing others' works for competitions, expelling students involved in academic misconduct), which has a slight dampening effect on application enthusiasm. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 77th with a rating of 'average,' and short video exposure is moderately low. In 2025, there were signs of a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors, but this was a localized phenomenon. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Management Science and Engineering received an A, the university's only A-level discipline. Mechanical Engineering, Instrument Science, Materials Science, and other engineering disciplines are relatively strong, highly correlated with the enrollment majors such as Mechanical, Instrument, and Materials categories.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: During the 2026 college entrance exam cycle, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended hot majors. These engineering majors align well with Hefei University of Technology's strengths, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million (including uncertain markings), a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined Physics and History categories of approximately 907,000 in 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 734,000 Physics Category candidates, intensifying competition. Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province (not a major source province for Henan students), but it has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan, with 300 Physics Category slots in 2026, making it an important source of students outside the province. There is no significant signal of geographical preference shifts.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two core factors of a significant 26% expansion in the 2026 Physics Category (which shifts rankings backward) and a substantial 32% increase in the total number of Henan candidates (which intensifies competition and shifts rankings forward), the expansion and candidate increase effects largely offset each other, but the candidate increase slightly outweighs. Combined with the sustained high popularity of engineering majors driving applications, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 68,198, with a range of 67,698–68,698.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering.

Tier 2 (Moderate)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Business Administration
- Financial Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 68,198, with a range of 67,698–68,698. It is recommended that candidates within this ranking range primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Integrated Circuits, Electrical Engineering, etc., the top engineering programs) as reach goals, and use Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 67,000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum liberal arts ranking was approximately 4672 → 11606 → 4867 → 5265. In 2022, due to significant fluctuations in the provincial control line, an abnormally high ranking occurred; in other years, it stabilized within the 4700–5300 range. In 2025, the first year of the new college entrance examination in Henan, the minimum ranking for the History Category was approximately 5105, which is basically consistent with recent liberal arts rankings. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5105. The university's liberal arts/history category enrollment plan in Henan: 15 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. In 2026, the history category enrollment plan is reduced to 10, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a drop of about 23%. This significant reduction will directly raise the admission threshold, causing the minimum ranking number to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years. It is known for engineering, with a small liberal arts scale. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which slightly suppresses application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranks 77th overall, with a rating of average and moderately low exposure. Management Science and Engineering is rated A, the only A-level discipline at the university. The liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, English) have low relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.text:
In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 466,000 history category candidates, leading to intensified competition.
7. [Regional Factor] Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province. Its liberal arts enrollment scale in Henan is small (only 10 in 2026), making it a secondary source of students outside the province. There is no significant signal of regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two core factors of a significant 23% reduction in history category enrollment in 2026 (causing rankings to move forward and competition to intensify) and a substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Henan Province (further intensifying competition), the dual pressures overlap. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 4298, with a range of 3798–4798.
